productDisplayName: United Colors Of Benetton Women Light Winter Black Sweatshirts
description: CompositionBlack knit top made of 80% cotton, 17% nylon and 3% spandex, has a ribbed closed neckline, full-front zipper, full arm sleeves with ribbed hems, ribbed hemline, two pockets with ribbed openings on either waist and Big Ben logo in mettalic embellishments on left chestFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cool water Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryKeep the chill away and enjoy the winter in style in this knit top from united colors of benetton. The closed neck and full arm sleeves are sure to keep the cold at bay, while you warm up to steaming hot street-food in style. Pair this with jeans and sports shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in topsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
